metadata.description: Dev workflow and AI agent development skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: general-oat-skills
plugins.description: All skills: project scaffolding, code quality, testing, review, QA, teaching, and release management

plugins.name: oat-core
plugins.description: Core dev workflow: check, cleanup, test, load, publish

plugins.name: oat-quality
plugins.description: Quality and learning: multi-agent QA audit, interactive teach-me lessons

plugins.name: oat-agents
plugins.description: AI agent development: project scaffolding (18 templates), ADK evaluations

plugins.name: oat-check
plugins.description: Quick project health check: git status, recent commits, GitHub Actions, package build

plugins.name: oat-cleanup
plugins.description: Code quality pipeline: ruff linting/formatting, mypy type checking, pytest

plugins.name: oat-test
plugins.description: Run pytest suite with coverage reporting and auto-fix on failures

plugins.name: oat-load
plugins.description: Load all markdown files from a directory into context

plugins.name: oat-publish
plugins.description: Release management: cleanup, version bump, build, GitHub release, publish monitoring

plugins.name: oat-qa
plugins.description: Multi-agent QA audit: code quality, architecture, security, tests, CI/CD, docs

plugins.name: oat-scaffold
plugins.description: Create projects from 18 templates: Python, Node.js, Rust, Go, and AI agent frameworks

plugins.name: oat-teach-me
plugins.description: Interactive lesson-based teaching with web research, quizzes, and difficulty levels

plugins.name: oat-run-adk-evals
plugins.description: Run Google ADK evaluations with detailed results and rate limiting
